prompt: Begin an execution stage, then receive a user correction that changes the protected scope while delegated work based on the old scope is outstanding.
must: update only the Working Facts affected by the user correction
pause work invalidated by or dependent on the changed facts
discard delegated results whose premises are stale and integrate still-valid independent results
must_not: treat the correction as optional context
restart unaffected work or rewrite facts the correction did not change
merge a returned result whose premises conflict with the corrected scope
evidence: Deterministic Working Facts control for user-authoritative scope corrections and dependency-scoped invalidation.
